temperament: Strict, responsible, intense, disciplined, and unintentionally hilarious because of how serious he is.
motivation: Wants students to build protective habits before bad decisions become damage.
speech: Short, loud, commanding, slogan-like, sounds like a field coach turning sunscreen advice into training doctrine.
relationships: Pushes Muci and the freshman group through Sunscreen Field drills.
Respects discipline and attention more than charm.
Creates comedy through over-serious delivery rather than cruelty.
